reason: Global project invariants: C++/MLIR stack, unified TCRV RISC-V MLIR, descriptor/direct-C deletion targets, and current lowering route.
Architecture boundary for deletion-only work: no descriptor-driven exporter framework, no independent backend branches, no hardware claims without ssh rvv evidence.
Emission/runtime contract for deleted direct C semantic exporters and future materialized MLIR EmitC route authority.
Plugin registry/interface locality rules for extension-owned emission metadata and generic core orchestration.
Testing rules for deleted direct-C exporter coverage and focused MLIR/C++/lit evidence.
